title: coreopsis lineariloba
intro: Coreopsis lineariloba, also known as Rock Coreopsis or Linearleaf Coreopsis, is a perennial wildflower native to the United States and Canada. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Coreopsis lineariloba include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from minor skin irritations and allergies. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
